title: Technique to perform demodulation of wireless communications signal data
abstract: Apparatuses, systems, and techniques to demodulate data for fifth-generation (5G) new radio (NR). In at least one embodiment, a processor includes one or more circuits to use a parallel processor to determine a signal value based, at least in part, on one or more predetermined probability values.
claims: 1. A processor comprising: one or more texture processing units (TPUs) to be used to demodulate one or more wireless communication signals, wherein the one or more wireless communication signals include a signal value corresponding to a bit represented by a quadrature amplitude modulation (QAM) symbol.
